NAME: Rotterdam Study
DESCRIPTION: Population-based cohort in Rotterdam (Erasmus MC) with longitudinal follow-up, imaging, and biosamples; among the most widely used European cohorts in cardiovascular and aging GWAS.
MANUAL_CITATION: Ikram, M. A., van der Heijden, R. J., Kors, J. A., Hofman, A., Franco, O. H., Uitterlinden, A. G., ... & Stricker, B. H. (2017). The Rotterdam Study: 2018 update on objectives, design and main results. European Journal of Epidemiology, 32(9), 807-850.
